name: Vigaro Runner 2: Return
short_description: Vigaro pill is back. Solve and finish 15 different themed levels and find yellow star in this 3d platformer
detailed_description:
Story:

Vigaro pill character is back in this 3d platformer sequel. Find yellow stars at every level to finish levels and get steam achievements. Player need avoid deathly traps like saws,blades,wheels. Hitting deathly traps will spawn player to start location. Also there are different platforms like rotating, moving and disappearing platforms so player need to make accurate jumps. Also there are 2 hidden stars blue and red stars hidden in few maps which gives player extra achievements. So be the hero vigaro and finish all levels

Features:

- 15 maps
- Deathly traps like saws,axes,blades
- Falling to water,lava or out of map will kill player
- Different platforms, like rotating, disappearing, moving platforms

  • Find yellow star to finish level and get steam achievements

  • 2 hidden stars red and blue stars are hidden somewhere in some maps. Find those to get more steam achievements

Controls:

Jump= Space Bar
Dash= Q
